title: pharus latifolius var. angustifolius
intro: Pharus latifolius var. angustifolius, also known as Pharus or Needle Pharus, is a variety of the Pharus latifolius plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pharus latifolius var. angustifolius include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in the management of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Pharus latifolius var. angustifolius typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves, which are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
